meaning: A unique set of numbers used to identify a specific bank account.
definition: A unique set of numbers used to identify a specific bank account.
example: Please double-check your account number before confirming the transfer.
exampleHindi: कृपया स्थानांतरण की पुष्टि करने से पहले अपना खाता नंबर दोबारा जांच लें।

meaning: The process of gradually paying off a debt over time through regular, equal payments.
definition: The paying off of debt with a fixed repayment schedule in regular installments over a period of time.
example: The bank provided an amortization schedule showing how the loan would be paid off over fifteen years.
exampleHindi: बैंक ने एक परिशोधन अनुसूची प्रदान की जिसमें दिखाया गया कि पंद्रह वर्षों में ऋण का भुगतान कैसे किया जाएगा।

meaning: The yearly interest rate charged for borrowing money or earned through an investment.
definition: The yearly interest rate charged for borrowing money or earned through an investment.
example: Compare the APR of different credit cards to find the one with the lowest borrowing costs.
exampleHindi: सबसे कम उधार लेने की लागत वाले क्रेडिट कार्ड को खोजने के लिए विभिन्न क्रेडिट कार्डों के एपीआर की तुलना करें।

meaning: A machine that dispenses cash and performs other banking services when you insert a bank card.
definition: A machine that dispenses cash and performs other banking services when you insert a bank card.
example: I need to find an ATM to withdraw some cash before going to the market.
exampleHindi: बाज़ार जाने से पहले मुझे कुछ नकदी निकालने के लिए एटीएम ढूंढना होगा।

meaning: The total amount of money in a bank account at a specific time.
definition: The total amount of money in a bank account at a specific time.
example: Please check your account balance to make sure you have enough money for the transfer.
exampleHindi: यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए कि आपके पास स्थानांतरण के लिए पर्याप्त धनराशि है, कृपया अपने खाते की शेष राशि की जांच करें।

meaning: A situation where many customers rush to withdraw their money from a bank because they fear it will fail.
definition: A situation where many customers rush to withdraw their money from a bank because they fear it will fail.
example: The government stepped in to prevent a bank run after rumors spread about the bank's stability.
exampleHindi: बैंक की स्थिरता के बारे में अफवाहें फैलने के बाद सरकार ने बैंक को रोकने के लिए कदम उठाया।

meaning: A printed or digital record showing all the deposits, withdrawals, and fees in a bank account.
definition: A printed or digital record showing all the deposits, withdrawals, and fees in a bank account.
example: I review my monthly bank statement to track my spending habits.
exampleHindi: मैं अपने खर्च करने की आदतों पर नज़र रखने के लिए अपने मासिक बैंक विवरण की समीक्षा करता हूँ।

meaning: A legal status of a person or organization that cannot repay the debts they owe to creditors.
definition: A legal status of a person or organization that cannot repay the debts they owe to creditors.
example: The retail chain declared bankruptcy after several years of falling sales.
exampleHindi: कई वर्षों की गिरती बिक्री के बाद खुदरा श्रृंखला ने दिवालिया घोषित कर दिया।

meaning: A person designated to receive the funds or assets from an account in the event of the owner's death.
definition: A person designated to receive the funds or assets from an account in the event of the owner's death.
example: He listed his daughter as the sole beneficiary of his savings account.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने अपनी बेटी को अपने बचत खाते के एकमात्र लाभार्थी के रूप में सूचीबद्ध किया।

meaning: A local office of a bank or other large organization.
definition: à¤¶à¤¾à¤–à¤¾
example: I need to visit the local branch to speak with a loan officer.
exampleHindi: मुझे ऋण अधिकारी से बात करने के लिए स्थानीय शाखा में जाना होगा।

meaning: A savings product that earns a fixed interest rate in exchange for keeping your money untouched for a set period.
definition: A savings product that earns a fixed interest rate in exchange for keeping your money untouched for a set period.
example: He put his savings into a one-year certificate of deposit to get a higher interest rate.
exampleHindi: अधिक ब्याज दर पाने के लिए उन्होंने अपनी बचत को एक साल के जमा प्रमाणपत्र में डाल दिया।

meaning: A bank account used for everyday transactions, from which money can be easily withdrawn or spent.
definition: A bank account used for everyday transactions, from which money can be easily withdrawn or spent.
example: I use my checking account to pay my monthly rent and buy groceries.
exampleHindi: मैं अपने मासिक किराए का भुगतान करने और किराने का सामान खरीदने के लिए अपने चेकिंग खाते का उपयोग करता हूं।

meaning: An asset that a borrower offers to a lender as security for a loan.
definition: An asset that a borrower offers to a lender as security for a loan.
example: She had to put up her house as collateral to secure the business loan.
exampleHindi: बिज़नेस लोन सुरक्षित करने के लिए उसे अपना घर जमानत के तौर पर देना पड़ा।

meaning: Interest calculated on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods.
definition: Interest calculated on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods.
example: Thanks to compound interest, even small savings can grow significantly over thirty years.
exampleHindi: चक्रवृद्धि ब्याज की बदौलत, छोटी बचत भी तीस वर्षों में उल्लेखनीय रूप से बढ़ सकती है।

meaning: The maximum amount of money a credit card company allows you to borrow or charge on your card.
definition: The maximum amount of money a credit card company allows you to borrow or charge on your card.
example: He reached his credit limit and could not make any more purchases until he paid off his balance.
exampleHindi: वह अपनी क्रेडिट सीमा तक पहुंच गया और जब तक उसने अपनी शेष राशि का भुगतान नहीं कर दिया तब तक वह कोई और खरीदारी नहीं कर सका।

meaning: A number representing a person's creditworthiness, based on their history of paying back debts.
definition: A number representing a person's creditworthiness, based on their history of paying back debts.
example: Paying your credit card bills on time is the best way to improve your credit score.
exampleHindi: अपने क्रेडिट कार्ड बिलों का समय पर भुगतान करना आपके क्रेडिट स्कोर को बेहतर बनाने का सबसे अच्छा तरीका है।

meaning: A cooperative financial institution owned and controlled by its members, often offering lower fees.
definition: A cooperative financial institution owned and controlled by its members, often offering lower fees.
example: She decided to join a local credit union instead of a major national bank.
exampleHindi: उसने एक प्रमुख राष्ट्रीय बैंक के बजाय एक स्थानीय क्रेडिट यूनियन में शामिल होने का फैसला किया।

meaning: An amount of money that is owed to a person, bank, or company.
definition: An amount of money that is owed to a person, bank, or company.
example: He worked hard to pay off all his college debt within five years.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने पांच साल के भीतर अपने कॉलेज का सारा कर्ज चुकाने के लिए कड़ी मेहनत की।

meaning: To fail to pay a debt or loan by the required time.
definition: The setting or value a system uses automatically unless you change it.
example: If you default on your car loan, the bank may take the car back.
exampleHindi: यदि आप अपने कार ऋण पर चूक करते हैं, तो बैंक कार वापस ले सकता है।

meaning: To put money into a bank account.
definition: To put money into a bank account.
example: I need to go to the bank to deposit this check into my account.
exampleHindi: मुझे इस चेक को अपने खाते में जमा करने के लिए बैंक जाना होगा।

meaning: A payment method where money is sent electronically straight into a recipient's bank account.
definition: A payment method where money is sent electronically straight into a recipient's bank account.
example: My salary is paid via direct deposit, so it is in my account every Friday morning.
exampleHindi: मेरा वेतन सीधे जमा के माध्यम से भुगतान किया जाता है, इसलिए यह हर शुक्रवार सुबह मेरे खाते में होता है।

meaning: A professional who helps individuals manage their money, investments, and financial planning.
definition: A professional who helps individuals manage their money, investments, and financial planning.
example: We met with a financial advisor to plan for our children's college education.
exampleHindi: हम अपने बच्चों की कॉलेज शिक्षा की योजना बनाने के लिए एक वित्तीय सलाहकार से मिले।

meaning: A person who promises to pay a debt if the borrower fails to do so.
definition: A person who promises to pay a debt if the borrower fails to do so.
example: Since the student had no income, her father signed as a guarantor for the apartment lease.
exampleHindi: चूंकि छात्रा की कोई आय नहीं थी, इसलिए उसके पिता ने अपार्टमेंट पट्टे के लिए गारंटर के रूप में हस्ताक्षर किए।

meaning: The percentage of a sum of money charged by a lender or paid by a bank to a saver.
definition: The percentage of a sum of money charged by a lender or paid by a bank to a saver.
example: The bank raised its interest rate on savings accounts to four percent.
exampleHindi: बैंक ने बचत खातों पर ब्याज दर बढ़ाकर चार प्रतिशत कर दी।

meaning: A bank account shared by two or more people, typically family members or business partners.
definition: A bank account shared by two or more people, typically family members or business partners.
example: My husband and I opened a joint account to manage our household expenses together.
exampleHindi: मेरे पति और मैंने मिलकर अपना घरेलू खर्च चलाने के लिए एक संयुक्त खाता खोला।

meaning: The ease with which assets or savings can be quickly converted into cash without losing value.
definition: The availability of liquid assets to a market or company.
example: Cash in a checking account has high liquidity, while real estate has low liquidity.
exampleHindi: चेकिंग खाते में नकदी में उच्च तरलता होती है, जबकि रियल एस्टेट में कम तरलता होती है।

meaning: The lowest amount of money that a customer must keep in a bank account to avoid fees.
definition: The lowest amount of money that a customer must keep in a bank account to avoid fees.
example: This checking account requires a minimum balance of five hundred dollars.
exampleHindi: इस चेकिंग खाते के लिए न्यूनतम पांच सौ डॉलर शेष की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: A service that allows customers to conduct financial transactions using a smartphone app.
definition: A service that allows customers to conduct financial transactions using a smartphone app.
example: Mobile banking makes it easy to deposit checks using your phone camera.
exampleHindi: मोबाइल बैंकिंग आपके फ़ोन कैमरे का उपयोग करके चेक जमा करना आसान बनाती है।

meaning: A specific type of loan used to purchase a house or real estate, where the property is security for the loan.
definition: A specific type of loan used to purchase a house or real estate, where the property is security for the loan.
example: They took out a thirty-year mortgage to buy their first home.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने अपना पहला घर खरीदने के लिए तीस साल का बंधक लिया।

meaning: Conducting banking transactions over the internet through a bank's website.
definition: Conducting banking transactions over the internet through a bank's website.
example: I logged into online banking to pay my utility bills last night.
exampleHindi: मैंने कल रात अपने उपयोगिता बिलों का भुगतान करने के लिए ऑनलाइन बैंकिंग में लॉग इन किया।

meaning: An arrangement or situation where you withdraw more money from your account than you actually have.
definition: An arrangement or situation where you withdraw more money from your account than you actually have.
example: Her account went into overdraft after the rent check was processed.
exampleHindi: किराए का चेक प्रोसेस होने के बाद उसका खाता ओवरड्राफ्ट में चला गया।

meaning: A charge imposed by a bank when a customer withdraws more money than is available in their account.
definition: A charge imposed by a bank when a customer withdraws more money than is available in their account.
example: I had to pay a thirty-dollar overdraft fee because my balance fell below zero.
exampleHindi: मुझे तीस डॉलर का ओवरड्राफ्ट शुल्क देना पड़ा क्योंकि मेरा शेष शून्य से नीचे चला गया था।

meaning: A secret number that you use with a bank card to withdraw money or make payments.
definition: To keep a specific post or comment at the top of a feed or thread.
example: Never share your PIN with anyone, not even bank employees.
exampleHindi: अपना पिन कभी भी किसी के साथ साझा न करें, यहां तक ​​कि बैंक कर्मचारियों के साथ भी नहीं।

meaning: A nine-digit code that identifies a specific financial institution in banking transactions.
definition: A nine-digit code that identifies a specific financial institution in banking transactions.
example: You will need both your bank routing number and account number to set up direct deposit.
exampleHindi: प्रत्यक्ष जमा स्थापित करने के लिए आपको अपने बैंक रूटिंग नंबर और खाता नंबर दोनों की आवश्यकता होगी।

meaning: A locked box inside a bank vault used for storing valuable items like jewelry or important papers.
definition: A locked box inside a bank vault used for storing valuable items like jewelry or important papers.
example: We keep our property deeds and old family gold in a safe deposit box.
exampleHindi: हम अपनी संपत्ति के कागजात और पुराने पारिवारिक सोने को एक सुरक्षित जमा बॉक्स में रखते हैं।

meaning: A bank account where you deposit money to save it, which usually earns interest over time.
definition: A bank account where you deposit money to save it, which usually earns interest over time.
example: It is smart to transfer a portion of your monthly salary to a savings account.
exampleHindi: अपने मासिक वेतन का एक हिस्सा बचत खाते में स्थानांतरित करना स्मार्ट है।

meaning: A bank employee who deals directly with customers, handling deposits and withdrawals.
definition: A bank employee who deals directly with customers, handling deposits and withdrawals.
example: The bank teller greeted me warmly and helped me deposit my money.
exampleHindi: बैंक टेलर ने मेरा गर्मजोशी से स्वागत किया और मेरे पैसे जमा करने में मेरी मदद की।

meaning: The act of taking money out of a bank account.
definition: The act of taking money out of a bank account.
example: She made a cash withdrawal of one hundred dollars from the ATM.
exampleHindi: उसने एटीएम से एक सौ डॉलर की नकद निकासी की।
